text.en:
If your Army Faction is **TYRANIDS**, while a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is within 6" of one or more friendly **SYNAPSE** models, that **TYRANIDS** unit is said to be within Synapse Range of that model and of your army. While a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army:

■ Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
■ Each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

If your Army Faction is **TYRANIDS**, once per battle, in either player’s Command phase, if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one or more **SYNAPSE** units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.

At the start of the battle round, you can select one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is within Synapse Range of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle.

■ **Synaptic Augmentation**: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.
■ **Surging Vitality**: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.
■ **Goaded to Slaughter**: While this unit is within Synapse Range of your army, each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

text.en:
Each time a **TYRANIDS** model from your army makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

Each time a **BURROWER** unit from your army is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, place a 40mm circular Tunnel Marker anywhere on the battlefield within 1" of that unit and more than 3" horizontally away from all enemy units.

In the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, when you set up a unit on the battlefield from Reserves, you can set that unit up wholly within 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" horizontally away from any enemy units.

If an enemy model (excluding **AIRCRAFT**) ends any kind of move within 3" of one of your Tunnel Markers, that Tunnel Marker is removed from the battlefield.

Each time a **TYRANIDS MONSTER** model from your army makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if that model’s unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if that model’s unit is Below Half-strength. In addition, while a **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army (excluding Battle-shocked units) is at its Starting Strength, add 2 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

In your opponent’s Shooting phase, when an enemy unit has shot, if a model from a friendly **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit was **destroyed** as a result of those attacks, that friendly unit can make a **surge move** of up to D6”.

Friendly Norn Emissary/Norn Assimilator units have the following ability: Protean Purpose: (Once per battle, per unit) In your Command phase, you can use this ability. If you do, this unit can make a selection for its Singular Purpose ability (this replaces the previous selection).
text.de: Befreundete Schwarmbote-/Schwarmassimilator-Einheiten haben die folgende Fähigkeit: Wandelbare Ziele: (Einmal pro Schlacht, pro Einheit) In deiner Befehlsphase kannst du diese Fähigkeit einsetzen. Wenn du dies tust, kann diese Einheit eine Wahl für ihre Fähigkeit Zielgerichtet treffen (diese ersetzt die zuvor getroffene Wahl).
text.es: Las unidades Emisario Norn/Asimilador Norn amigas tienen esta habilidad: Propósito primordial: (Una vez por batalla, por unidad) En tu fase de mando, puedes usar esta habilidad. Si lo haces, esta unidad puede hacer una selección para su habilidad Propósito singular (la cual sustituye a su selección previa).
text.fr: Les unités d’Émissaire Norne/Assimilatrice Norne amies ont aptitude suivante : Objectif Protéiforme : (Une fois par bataille, par unité) À votre phase de Commandement, vous pouvez utiliser cette aptitude. Dans ce cas, cette unité peut faire un choix pour son aptitude But Singulier (ce choix remplace le précédent).
text.it: Le unità di Emissario della Norna/Assimilatore della Norna amiche hanno la seguente abilità: Cambiare Obiettivo: (Una volta per battaglia, per unità) Puoi usare questa abilità nella tua fase di Comando. Se lo fai, questa unità può effettuare una selezione per la sua abilità Obiettivo Unico (ciò sostituisce la selezione precedente).
text.ja: 味方ノルン・エミッサリー/ノルン・アシミレイター・ユニットは以下のアビリティを持つ： 任務の変転（ユニットごとに、バトル中1回限り）自軍側指揮フェイズ中、自軍はこのアビリティを使用できる。使用する場合、このユニットは『特殊任務』アビリティの選択を行える（これは現在選択されているものと置き換えられる）。
text.ko: 아군 노른의 사자/노른의 흡수자 유닛에 다음 능력을 부여합니다. 변화무쌍한 목적: (유닛마다 전투당 한 번) 플레이어의 지휘 페이즈에, 이 능력을 사용할 수 있습니다. 그렇게 할 경우, 이 유닛은 분명한 목적 능력의 대상을 지정할 수 있습니다(새 대상은 이전 대상을 대체합니다).
text.zh: 己方诺恩使者/诺恩同化者单位拥有以下技能。 多变的目的：（每个单位，每场战斗限一次）在您的指挥阶段中，您可以使用本技能。若使用，那么该单位可以选择一个自身单一目标技能的选项（这个选项将替换之前的选项）。

text.en: **TYRANIDS** units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Fell Back. **VANGUARD INVADER** units with this ability are eligible to charge in a turn in which they Advanced.
**DEATHLEAPER** loses the Hunter Organism rule and can be your **WARLORD**.

text.en: At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for **TYRANIDS** units from your army until the end of the battle.
Each time a **TYRANIDS** model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets an **INFANTRY** or **SWARM** unit, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.
Each time a **TYRANIDS** model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a **MONSTER** or **VEHICLE** unit, that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.
Each time a **TYRANIDS** model with this Hyper-adaptation makes an attack that targets a **CHARACTER** unit, on a Critical Hit, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

In your Command phase, each **HARVESTER** unit from your army can Regenerate one friendly **TYRANIDS** unit that is within 6" of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. Each time a unit regenerates, do one of the following:

■ One model in that unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds.
■ One destroyed **INFANTRY** model (excluding **CHARACTERS**) is returned to that unit with its full wounds remaining. If that unit is an **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

name.ja: ノルン・クイーンの鉤爪

name.fr: Assaut de Bioformes de Type Guerrier

target.en: One **SYNAPSE** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the turn, while a friendly **TYRANIDS** unit is within 9" of the selected unit, that unit is within Synapse Range of your army.

fluff.en: Tyranids are one with the Hive Mind; individuality is a disadvantage that they surpass.

target.en: One **SYNAPSE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase, and one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to the **SYNAPSE** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly **TYRANIDS** model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, if the attacking model’s unit is within 6" of your **SYNAPSE** unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

fluff.en: Whether paralysing its prey or forcing them to stumble out of cover with its force of will, or else puppeteering nearby warrior organisms, the leader-beast ensures the prey targets are struck down.

target.en: One **SYNAPSE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

fluff.en: Psionic shielding crackles around these leader-beasts, helping to ensure their survival.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[IGNORES COVER]** ability, and until the end of the phase each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that model’s Ballistic Skill characteristic and any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

fluff.en: One cannot hide from a gestalt entity with a million eyes, even in the densest cover.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Tyranid monsters have reserves of energy that they unleash in waves of devastating fury.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test and, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack that targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. If that Battle-shock test was failed, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: This monster is even more terrifying to behold than other bioforms of its kind.

target.en: One **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

fluff.en: Skittering, darting and pouring over one another, the Tyranids make for hard and confusing targets.

target.en: One **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability, and If your unit contains 15 or more models, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: The sheer weight of Tyranid numbers begins to tell as they bury their victims in lashing, biting horror.

target.en: One **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.

fluff.en: Synaptic impulses from the Hive Mind urge greater speed from the swarm’s warrior organisms.

target.en: That **VANGUARD INVADER** unit.

when.en: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a **VANGUARD INVADER** unit from your army has selected its targets.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit that was selected as the target of one or more of your unit’s attacks. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the Battle-shock test was failed, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

fluff.en: Vanguard organisms strike from unexpected quarters with calculated and emotionless alien savagery that is appalling to behold.

target.en: One **VANGUARD INVADER INFANTRY** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[PRECISION]** ability.

fluff.en: These bioforms have been adapted to strike with pinpoint precision at the pre-assessed weak points of selected prey that require elimination.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 6+ ability. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability instead.

fluff.en: Prey stare in horror as chitinous armour regrows and flesh, muscle and sinew knots back together.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that just destroyed an enemy unit.

when.en: Your Fight phase.

effect.en: Your unit immediately Regenerates (See Feed the Swarm). When doing so, if your unit is a **HARVESTER** unit and you choose for one model to regain up to D3 lost wounds, that model regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.

fluff.en: The hunger of the Tyranids can never be satiated.

target.en: Up to two **TYRANIDS** units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army and are eligible to fight, or one other **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is eligible to fight.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in any of those selected units makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

fluff.en: These warrior organisms destroy all as their adrenaline surges.

target.en: That **TYRANIDS MONSTER** model.

when.en: Your Charge phase, just after a **TYRANIDS MONSTER** model from your army ends a Charge move.

effect.en: Select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of your model and roll six D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: Employing their sheer bulk and vicious chitinous horns and spikes, the largest Tyranids crash headlong through the foe, often with devastating results.

target.en: One **HARVESTER** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the battle, each time a friendly **TYRANIDS** model makes an attack that targets the enemy unit that just destroyed your **HARVESTER** unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

fluff.en: Should a foe successfully slay one of the swarm’s assimilation organisms, they only mark themselves as a priority for predation and consumption in turn.

target.en: One **HARVESTER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. If your unit is within range of an objective marker you control, until the end of the phase models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability instead.

fluff.en: These organisms have employed consumed minerals to exude an additional hardened protective layer over their chitinous armour.

target.en: One **SYNAPSE** unit from your army within 12" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Any phase, just after an enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test.

effect.en: Roll six D6: for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fluff.en: In the heart of the swarms, the Shadow in the Warp can literally kill with its smothering power.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one Synaptic Imperative, even if you have already selected that imperative this battle. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your unit instead of any other Synaptic Imperative that is active for your army.

fluff.en: At need, the focused will of the Tyranid leader-beasts can goad warrior organisms to exhibit strategically beneficial behaviours at the instant they are needed most.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army and made a Fall Back move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge this turn.

fluff.en: The seemingly omniscient Hive Mind processes the sensory input of its swarms at an impossible rate, and compels its broods to react accordingly.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.

when.en: End of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of your next Fight phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** and **[IGNORES COVER]** abilities.

fluff.en: Emerging from the depths, Tyranid bioforms level their weapon morphs and spit hissing volleys of living ammunition into the exposed backs of outflanked prey.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is wholly within 9" of one or more of your Tunnel Markers and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your Movement phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and set it up again, wholly within 9" of another Tunnel Marker you placed, and more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: Taking advantage of freshly burrowed tunnels, Tyranid bioforms move swiftly across the landscape, emerging in unexpected locations.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army that was set up as Reinforcements this turn.

when.en: Your Charge phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, friendly **TYRANIDS** units within 6" of your unit can re-roll Charge rolls.

fluff.en: A hive fleet’s vanguard organisms favour mobility and aggression, keeping the foe on the back foot with repeated coordinated assaults.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit or up to two **BURROWER** units from your army that are not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

fluff.en: The network of tunnels beneath the battlefield enables Tyranid organisms to retreat from the foe and prepare further ambushes.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS MONSTER** unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en:
Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through models (excluding **TITANIC** models) and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height. When doing so:
■ It can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them.
■ It can also move through sections of terrain features that are more than 4" in height, but if it does, after its unit has moved, roll one D6: on a 1, your unit is Battle-shocked.

fluff.en: Encircling and entrapping such physically powerful and fearless beasts is nigh on impossible.

target.en: That **TYRANIDS MONSTER** model. You can use this Stratagem on that model even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after a **TYRANIDS MONSTER** model from your army with the Deadly Demise ability that cannot Fly is destroyed.

effect.en: Do not roll one D6 to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by your model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted.

fluff.en: Highly acidic fluids spray from the creature’s wounds, lethal to those nearby.

target.en: That **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit

when.en: Any phase, just before an **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army that is within Synapse Range of your army makes a Surge move.

effect.en: When making that Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 to determine how far your unit moves, and your unit can end that move as close as possible to the closest objective marker (instead of as close as possible to the closest enemy unit). All other rules for making Surge moves still apply.

fluff.en: For a moment, a minuscule sliver of the Hive Mind’s ineffable will is focussed through these warrior organisms, driving them to pounce upon either valuable prey or else some vital strategic target.

target.en: One **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit is treated as containing fewer than five models for the purpose of the **[BLAST]** ability.

fluff.en: Triggered by incoming projectile fire, a synaptic pulse spurs the danger-senses of lesser warrior organisms and causes them to scatter like a shoal evading predators. Only once the explosions have stopped and the dust cleared do the bioforms bunch up once again.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that is in Reserves, or up to two **VANGUARD INVADER** units from your army that are in Reserves.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, for the purposes of setting up those selected units on the battlefield, treat the current battle round number as being one higher than it actually is.

fluff.en: Warrior organisms erupt from concealment straight into advanced positions.

target.en: One **VANGUARD INVADER** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, your unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18" or, if your unit has the Lone Operative ability, if the attacking model is within 6". Your opponent can select new targets for the attacking unit’s attacks.

fluff.en: Hyper-attuned senses warn vanguard organisms when they are being targeted by the prey.

target.en: Up to two **VANGUARD INVADER** units from your army, or one **TYRANIDS INFANTRY** unit from your army.

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.

effect.en: Remove the targeted units from the battlefield and place them into Strategic Reserves.

restrictions.en: The targeted units must be more than 3" away from all enemy units.

fluff.en: Hunter-slayer organisms can melt away before the eyes of their foes, only to strike from a new direction.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.

when.en: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

fluff.en: Tyranids care nothing for self-preservation, lashing out even in death.

target.en: That **TYRANIDS** unit.

when.en: Fight phase, just before a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army Consolidates.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit Consolidates, models in it can move an additional 3" as long as your unit can end that move within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units. If your unit is within Synapse Range of your army and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, instead of making that Consolidation move, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

fluff.en: Tyranids in battle form an unstoppable avalanche of flesh and chitin that buries the foe alive.

target.en: Up to two **TYRANIDS** units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other **TYRANIDS** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: Select one Hyper-adaptation. Until the start of your next Command phase, that Hyper-adaptation is active for those selected units in addition to any other that may be active for your army.

restrictions.en: You cannot select the same Hyper-adaptation you selected at the start of the first battle round.

fluff.en: Guided by the instincts of leader-beasts, the swarm can be tasked with focusing its hunting instincts.

target.en: Up to two **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** units from your army that are within Synapse Range of your army, or one other **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army.

when.en: Your Command phase.

effect.en: You can return up to D3+3 destroyed models to each of those selected units.

fluff.en: As the battle rages, more organisms pour in to bolster the swarms.

target.en: One **HARVESTER** unit from your army that is within 6" of that destroyed unit.

when.en: Any phase, when a **TYRANIDS** unit from your army is destroyed, before the last model in it is removed from play.

effect.en: Regenerate one friendly **TYRANIDS** unit within 6" of your **HARVESTER** unit (See Feed the Swarm).

fluff.en: Dead Tyranids are consumed and reconstituted by the swarm just as readily as the lifeless carcasses of their prey.

target.en: One **HARVESTER** unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker you control.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

fluff.en: Swarms of diminutive Tyranid phage organisms carpet even the most vital strategic assets, steadily breaking them down for assimilation.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.

when.en: Fight phase.

effect.en: Until the end of the phase, melee weapons equipped by models in your unit have the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability. If your unit is a **HARVESTER** unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit as well.

fluff.en: When rich sources of biomass are identified the warrior organisms of this swarm will stop at nothing to destroy resistance and claim them.

target.en: One **ENDLESS MULTITUDE** unit from your army that was just destroyed. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it was just destroyed.

when.en: Any phase.

effect.en: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, in Strategic Reserves, at its Starting Strength.

restrictions.en: Any destroyed **CHARACTER** units that were attached to your unit are not returned. You can only use this Stratagem once per battle.

fluff.en: No matter how many warrior organisms are slain, more are already surging forward over their corpses.

target.en: Up to two **VANGUARD INVADER** units from your army that are within 8" of that enemy unit, or one other **TYRANIDS INFANTRY** unit from your army that is within 8" of that enemy unit.

when.en: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.

effect.en: Those selected units can each make a Normal move of up to 6".

restrictions.en: You cannot target units that are within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

fluff.en: Hissing clusters of scillia warn of the slightest prey movements, allowing the Tyranids to react.

target.en: One **MAWLOC** or **TRYGON** unit from your army.

when.en: Command phase.

effect.en: Until the start of your next Command phase, your unit has the **SYNAPSE** keyword.

fluff.en: On occasions where subterranean assaults are deemed tactically useful, the hive mind may spontaneously alter its burrowing organisms, enabling them to act as beacons for its will.

target.en: One **TYRANIDS** unit from your army, wholly within 9" of one or more Tunnel Markers you placed.

when.en: Your Movement phase.

effect.en: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds, or you can return up to D3+1 destroyed models with a Wounds characteristic of 1 to your unit, with their full wounds remaining, instead.

fluff.en: Scrambling through the tunnels come endless multitudes of warrior-beasts and harvester bioforms, spilling out of the depths to reinforce the teeming masses.

target.en: That <k>Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers</k> unit.
target.es: Esa unidad <k>Muerte Silenciosa/Líctor/Neurolíctor/Saltadores de Von Ryan</k>.
target.fr: Cette unité de <k>La Mort Subite/Lictor/Neurolictor/Bondisseurs de Von Ryan</k>.
target.ja: その<k>デスリーパー/リクター/フォン・ライアンズ・リーパー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>死亡跃袭者/刀斧虫/神经刀斧虫/冯·瑞恩跃袭者</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor/Von Ryan’s Leapers unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Todeshetzer-/Liktor-/Neuroliktor/Von-Ryan-Springteufel-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate cuando una unidad Muerte Silenciosa/Líctor/Neurolíctor/Saltadores de Von Ryan amiga se elige para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité de La Mort Subite/Lictor/Neurolictor/Bondisseurs de Von Ryan amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Raptomorte/Littore/Neurolittore/Saltatori di Von Ryan amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方デスリーパー/リクター/フォン・ライアンズ・リーパー・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 저승도약수/릭터/뉴로릭터/폰 라이언의 도약수 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 近战阶段中，在一个己方死亡跃袭者/刀斧虫/神经刀斧虫/冯·瑞恩跃袭者单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s attacks that target a hidden unit have +1 S and AP.
effect.de: Attacken dieser Einheit gegen eine versteckte Einheit haben +1 auf S und DS
effect.es: Los ataques de tu unidad que tomen como blanco una unidad oculta tienen +1 a F y +1 a FP.
effect.fr: Les attaques de votre unité qui ciblent une unité cachée ont +1 en F et en PA.
effect.it: Gli attacchi della tua unità che hanno come bersaglio un’unità nascosta hanno +1 Fo e +1 VP.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの攻撃が隠密状態のユニットを対象としている場合、【攻】と【数】に+1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 은폐 상태의 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 이 유닛의 공격에 위력 및 관통 +1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在您的单位对隐藏的单位进行攻击时，攻击的 S 与 AP +1。

fluff.en: One should never attempt to lay a trap for perfectly adapted ambush hunters, lest one become the prey in turn.
fluff.de: Man sollte niemals versuchen, perfekten Lauerjägern eine Falle zu stellen, denn dann wird man schnell selbst zur Beute.
fluff.es: Nunca intentes tender una trampa a cazadores perfectamente adaptados a emboscadas, o te convertirás en la presa.
fluff.fr: Il est malavisé de tenter de piéger des chasseurs optimisés pour l’embuscade, au risque de devenir leur proie.
fluff.it: Non bisognerebbe mai tendere trappole ai cacciatori esperti, il rischio è di diventare prede.
fluff.ja: 完璧に適応した待ち伏せの狩人に、決して罠など仕掛けてはならない。さもなくば、今度は自らが獲物となってしまう。
fluff.ko: 완벽하게 적응한 매복 사냥꾼들을 상대로 덫을 놓으려 해서는 안 된다. 자신이 사냥감으로 전락할 생각이 없다면.
fluff.zh: 永远不要尝试对完美的伏击掠食者设下埋伏，否则自身将会遭到狩猎。

target.en: One friendly unengaged Deathleaper/Lictor/Neurolictor unit.
target.de: Eine befreundete Todeshetzer-/Liktor-/Neuroliktor-Einheit, die nicht im Nahkampf ist
target.fr: Une unité de La Mort Subite/Lictor/Neurolictor amie non engagée.
target.ja: 非接敵状態の味方デスリーパー/リクター/ニューロリクター・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个不处于交战状态的己方死亡跃袭者/刀斧虫/神经刀斧虫单位。

when.en: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
when.de: Am Ende der Nahkampfphase deines Gegners
when.es: Al final de la fase de combate del oponente.
when.fr: À la fin de la phase de Combat adverse.
when.it: Alla fine della fase di Combattimento dell’avversario.
when.ja: 敵軍側白兵フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您对手的近战阶段结束时。

effect.en: Place your unit in strategic reserves.
effect.de: Versetze deine Einheit in die strategische Reserve.
effect.es: Coloca tu unidad en la reserva estratégica.
effect.it: Colloca la tua unità nelle riserve strategiche.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを戦略的予備戦力に配置する。
effect.zh: 将该己方单位放入战略预备队。

fluff.en: What seemed a certain and identified Tyranid contact vanishes suddenly from sight and sensors both, seemingly nothing but a ghost all along.
fluff.de: Was für einen sicher identifizierten Tyranidenkontakt gehalten wurde, verschwindet plötzlich gleichermaßen aus dem Blickfeld und den Sensorauslesungen und war scheinbar bloß ein Geist.
fluff.es: Lo que parecía un Tiránido localizado e identificado desaparece repentinamente de la vista y de los sensores, como si fuera un fantasma.
fluff.fr: Ce qui semble être un contact tyranide certain et identifié se volatilise soudain, tel un fantôme.
fluff.it: Quello che pareva un contatto tiranide confermato d’un tratto svanisce sia alla vista che ai sensori, come se fosse uno spettro.
fluff.ja: 確実に捕捉され、識別されたはずのティラニッド反応が、視界からも感知装置からも突如として消失する——もとより実体なき幻影であったかのように。
fluff.ko: 눈에도 센서에도 분명 티라니드로 확인되었던 것이 갑자기 사라진다. 마치 유령이라도 본 듯하다.
fluff.zh: 那个原本看似确凿无疑、已被锁定的泰伦虫族接触目标，突然间从视线与传感器中双双消失，仿佛自始至终都不过是一道幽灵。

target.en: One friendly <k>DEATHLEAPER/LICTOR/NEUROLICTOR/VON RYAN’S LEAPERS</k> unit.
target.es: 1 unidad <k>Muerte Silenciosa/Líctor/Neurolíctor/Saltadores de Von Ryan</k> amiga.
target.fr: Une unité de <k>La Mort Subite/Lictor/Neurolictor/Bondisseurs de Von Ryan</k> amie.
target.it: Un’unità di <k>Raptomorte/Littore/Neurolittore/Saltatori di Von Ryan</k> amica.
target.ja: 味方<k>デスリーパー/リクター/ニューロリクター/フォン・ライアンズ・リーパー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>死亡跃袭者/刀斧虫/神经刀斧虫/冯·瑞恩跃袭者</k>单位。

when.en: Start of your Shooting phase.
when.es: Al inicio de tu fase de disparo.
when.fr: Au début de votre phase de Tir.
when.it: All’inizio della tua fase di Tiro.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ開始時。

effect.en: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. That enemy unit has +6" detection range.
effect.de: Wähle eine für deine Einheit sichtbare feindliche Einheit innerhalb von 12". Jene feindliche Einheit hat +6" Entdeckungsreichweite.
effect.es: Elige 1 unidad enemiga visible y a 12" o menos de tu unidad. Esa unidad enemiga tiene +6" al alcance de detección.
effect.fr: Choisissez une unité ennemie visible et à 12" ou moins de votre unité. L'unité ennemie choisie a +6" en portée de détection.
effect.it: Scegli un’unità nemica visibile entro 12" dalla tua unità. Quell’unità nemica ha +6" alla distanza di individuazione.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの12mv以内に一部でも入っており、視認可能な敵ユニットを1個選択する。選択された敵ユニットの発見範囲は+6mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 시야에 들어오며 12" 내에 있는 적 유닛 하나를 지정합니다. 그 적 유닛에 발각 범위 +6"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个位于您的单位 12" 内的可见敌方单位。那个敌方单位拥有 +6" 侦测范围。

fluff.en: The organisms that comprise the Tyranid vanguard possess exceptionally keen senses, detecting prey no matter how well hidden it may be and relaying its location to the wider Hive Mind.
fluff.de: Die Organismen, die die Vorhut der Tyraniden stellen, zeichen sich durch außerordentliche Sinne aus und können Beute aufspüren, wie gut sie sich auch verstecken mag. Schnell geben sie ihre Erkenntnisse an das restliche Schwarmbewusstsein weiter.
fluff.es: Los organismos que forman la vanguardia Tiránida poseen sentidos excepcionales, que detectan las presas por bien que se escondan y transmiten su ubicación al resto de la Mente Colmena.
fluff.fr: Les organismes qui composent l'avant-garde tyranide ont des sens exceptionnels et peuvent détecter des proies cachées et relayer leurs positions à l'Esprit-ruche.
fluff.it: Grazie ai sensi eccezionali, gli organismi che compongono l’avanguardia dei Tiranidi riescono a individuare le prede nascoste e a riferirne la posizione al resto della Mente dell’Alveare.
fluff.ja: ティラニッドの先遣群を構成する個体は、極めて鋭敏な感覚を備えている。いかに巧みに身を隠そうとも、これらの個体は獲物を探知し、位置情報を群巣意識体に伝えることができる。
fluff.ko: 티라니드 선두 개체의 감각은 놀라울 정도로 예민해, 아무리 잘 숨은 사냥감의 위치도 포착하여 전체 군체 의식에 알린다.
fluff.zh: 构成泰伦虫族先锋的生物拥有极其敏锐的感官，无论猎物藏匿得多么隐蔽，它们都能将其侦测出来，并将位置信息回传给庞大的虫巢意志。

target.en: That <k>Norn Assimilator/Norn Emissary</k> unit.
target.it: Quell’unità di <k>Assimilatore della Norna/Emissario della Norna</k>.
target.ja: その<k>ノルン・アシミレイター/ノルン・エミッサリー</k>・ユニット。
target.zh: 那个<k>诺恩同化者/诺恩使者</k>单位。

when.en: Fight phase, when a friendly Norn Assimilator/Norn Emissary unit is selected to fight.
when.de: Nahkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Schwarmassimilator-/Schwarmbote-Einheit zum Kämpfen gewählt wird
when.es: En la fase de combate, cuando una unidad Asimilador Norn/Emisario Norn amiga se elija para combatir.
when.fr: À la phase de Combat, quand une unité d’Assimilatrice Norne/Émissaire Norne amie est choisie pour combattre.
when.it: Nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità di Assimilatore della Norna/Emissario della Norna amica viene scelta per combattere.
when.ja: 白兵フェイズ中、味方<k>ノルン・アシミレイター/ノルン・エミッサリー</k>・ユニットが白兵を宣言した時。
when.ko: 백병전 페이즈, 아군 노른의 흡수자/노른의 사자 유닛이 백병전 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在近战阶段中，当一个己方诺恩同化者/诺恩使者单位被选择进行近战时。

effect.en: Your unit’s melee attacks have +2 S.
effect.es: Los ataques de combate de tu unidad tienen +2 a F.
effect.fr: Les attaques de mêlée de votre unité ont +2 en F.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da mischia della tua unità hanno +2 Fo.
effect.ja: そのユニットの白兵攻撃の【攻】は+2の修正を受ける。
effect.zh: 您的单位的近战攻击拥有 +2 S。

fluff.en: Focused on achieving its assigned imperative, this towering bioform smashes prey from its path with glad‑driven surges of additional might.
fluff.de: Diese riesige Bioform ist darauf fokussiert, ihren zugewiesenen Imperativ zu erfüllen, und schmettert Beute mit drüsengesteuerten Hieben zusätzlicher Kraft aus dem Weg.
fluff.es: Concentrada en cumplir su imperativo asignado, esta imponente bioforma aplasta a sus presas con oleadas de poder adicional impulsadas por el disfrute.
fluff.fr: Concentrée sur l'accomplissement de ses objectifs, cette bioforme fait voler en éclats les proies sur son chemin avec à un surcroît de force.
fluff.it: Concentrata sul raggiungimento dell’obiettivo, questa torreggiante bioforma elimina le prede che si trova davanti con un impeto crescente dettato dalla brama.
fluff.ja: 与えられた命令の遂行に集中するこの巨躯の生体は、歓喜に満ちた力の高まりとともに、行く手に立ちはだかる獲物たちを叩き潰す。
fluff.ko: 목표를 달성하는 데 전념하는 이 거대 생명체는 고유한 분비선에서 강대한 힘을 끌어내 앞을 가로막는 적을 박살 낸다.
fluff.zh: 这个巨大生物全神贯注于达成其受命执行的要务，凭借由狂喜所激发的额外力量洪流，将猎物从其行进路途上一一击碎。

target.en: That <k>Norn Assimilator</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ノルン・アシミレイター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Any phase, when a friendly <k>Norn Assimilator</k> unit suffers a mortal wound.
when.de: Beliebige Phase, wenn eine befreundete <k>Schwarmassimilator</k>-Einheit eine tödliche Verwundung erleidet
when.es: En cualquier fase, cuando una unidad <k>Asimilador Norn</k> amiga sufre una herida mortal.
when.fr: À n’importe quelle phase, quand une unité d’<k>Assimilatrice Norne</k> amie subit a blessure mortelle.
when.it: In qualsiasi fase, quando un’unità di <k>Assimilatore della Norna</k> amica subisce una ferita mortale.
when.ja: いずれかのフェイズ中、味方<k>ノルン・アシミレイター</k>・ユニットが致命的ダメージを受けたとき。
when.ko: 어느 페이즈든, 아군 <k>노른의 흡수자</k> 유닛이 치명상을 입을 때.
when.zh: 任意阶段中，在一个己方<k>诺恩同化者</k>单位受到一处致命伤时。

effect.en: Your unit has Feel No Pain 4+ against mortal wounds.
effect.de: Deine Einheit hat Verletzungen ignorieren 4+ gegen tödliche Verwundungen.
effect.es: Tu unidad tiene No hay dolor 4+ contra heridas mortales.
effect.fr: Votre unité a Insensible à la Douleur 4+ contre les blessures mortelles.
effect.it: La tua unità ha Insensibile al Dolore 4+ contro le ferite mortali.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットは致命的ダメージに対する『痛みを知らぬ者4+』を持つ。
effect.zh: 您的单位针对致命伤拥有不觉疼痛 4+。

fluff.en: Impacts and surface damage trigger explosive inflammation within this organism’s exoskeleton, spawning hardened outer layers that stave off even the most grievous hurts.
fluff.de: Einschläge und oberflächlicher Schaden lösen eine explosionsartige Entzündungsreaktion im Exoskelett der Bestie aus, sodass Schichten aus hartem Schorf wuchern, die selbst ärgste Verletzungen abmildern.
fluff.es: Los impactos y el daño superficial desencadenan una inflamación explosiva dentro del exoesqueleto de este organismo, generando capas externas endurecidas que protegen de las heridas.
fluff.fr: Les impacts et les dégâts déclenchent une inflammation de l'exosquelette de cet organisme, qui crée des couches protectrices capables de résister aux coups les plus puissants.
fluff.it: Impatti e danni superficiali innescano infiammazioni esplosive nell’esoscheletro di questo organismo, generando robusti strati esterni che respingono persino gli attacchi più violenti.
fluff.ja: 打撃や外皮の損傷は、この個体の外骨格内で急激な炎症反応を引き起こす。それによって強化された外殻層が生成され、いかに致命的な打撃をも退けるほどとなる。
fluff.ko: 충격과 외부 피해는 유기체의 외골격 내에 폭발적인 염증을 유발한다. 이 염증으로 인해 발생한 경화 외피는 가장 극심한 타격도 막아낸다.
fluff.zh: 撞击与表面损伤会在该生物的外骨骼内部引发爆发性的炎症反应，从而催生出坚硬的外层，足以抵御哪怕是最为严重的创伤。

target.en: That <k>Norn Assimilator</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ノルン・アシミレイター</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly <k>Norn Assimilator</k> unit has shot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, nachdem eine befreundete <k>Schwarm­assimilator</k>-Einheit geschossen hat
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad <k>Asimilador Norn</k> amiga haya disparado.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité d’<k>Assimilatrice Norne</k> amie a tiré.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di <k>Assimilatore della Norna</k> amica ha tirato.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方<k>ノルン・アシミレイター</k>・ユニットが射撃を行った時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 <k>노른의 흡수자</k> 유닛이 사격 수행을 종료했을 때.
when.zh: 己方射击阶段中，在一个己方<k>诺恩同化者</k>单位完成射击后。

effect.en:
Select one enemy unit hit by those attacks. That enemy unit is tethered until the start of your next Command phase:
  • While a unit is tethered, that unit has ‑2" M.
effect.de:
Wähle eine feindliche Einheit, die von mindestens einer jener Attacken getroffen wurde. Jene feindliche Einheit ist bis zum Beginn deiner nächsten Befehlsphase eingesponnen:
  • Solange eine Einheit eingesponnen ist, hat jene Einheit -2" B.
effect.es:
Elige 1 unidad enemiga en la que haya impactado alguno de esos ataques. Esa unidad enemiga está amarrada hasta el inicio de tu siguiente fase de mando:
  • Mientras una unidad esté amarrada, tiene -2" a M.
effect.fr:
Choisissez une unité ennemie touchée par ces attaques. Ladite unité ennemie est enchevêtrée jusqu’au début de votre prochaine phase de Commandement :
  • Tant qu’une unité est enchevêtrée, elle a ‑2” en M.
effect.it:
Scegli un’unità nemica colpita da quegli attacchi. Quell’unità nemica è vincolata fino all’inizio della tua prossima fase di Comando:
  • Fintanto che un’unità è vincolata, ha -2" M.
effect.ja:
それらの攻撃がヒットしている敵ユニットを1個選択する。次の自軍側指揮フェイズ開始時まで、選択された敵ユニットは引き留め状態となる。
  • ユニットが引き留め状態である間、そのユニットの【移】は-2mvの修正を受ける。
effect.ko:
그 공격이 명중한 적 유닛을 하나 지정합니다. 플레이어의 다음 지휘 페이즈가 시작될 때까지 그 적 유닛은 결박됩니다.
  • 유닛이 결박된 동안, 그 유닛에 이동 -2"를 적용합니다.
effect.zh:
选择一个被那些攻击命中的敌方单位。直到下一个己方指挥阶段开始前，那个敌方单位被束缚：
  • 当一个单位被束缚时，那个单位拥有 -2" M。

fluff.en: These revolting living shells burst on impact to ensnare nearby prey organisms in a mess of dripping, incredibly sticky strands that take time to tear free of.
fluff.de: Diese ekelhaften, lebendigen Geschosse brechen bei Aufschlag auf, um nahe Beuteorganismen mit einem Gewirr feuchter und ungeheuer klebriger Stränge zu überziehen, die schwierig zu lösen sind.
fluff.es: Estas repugnantes balas vivientes estallan al impactar y atrapan a las presas cercanas en una maraña de hebras pegajosas y goteantes que tardan en desprenderse.
fluff.fr: Ces révulsantes munitions vivantes éclatent à l’impact pour recouvrir les organismes proies alentour de fils atrocement collants dont on met du temps à se libérer.
fluff.it: Questi rivoltanti involucri viventi esplodono all’impatto per avvolgere gli organismi preda nelle vicinanze in una matassa di filamenti incredibilmente appiccicosi da cui è difficile liberarsi.
fluff.ja: この忌まわしき生体弾は着弾と同時に炸裂し、周囲の獲物を粘着性の糸の塊で絡め取る。その束縛からは、そう簡単に逃れられない。
fluff.ko: 이 역겨운 생체 탄환은 충격과 동시에 폭발한다. 이때 놀라울 정도로 점착성이 높은 가닥이 마구 분출하면서 주변의 개체를 옭아매는데, 이를 끊어내려면 오랜 시간이 걸린다.
fluff.zh: 这些令人恶心的活体弹药会在撞击目标后破裂并将猎物困在粘稠的丝线之中，需要花费一些时间才能够挣脱。

target.en: That <k>Tyranid Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ティラニッド・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, when an enemy unit targets a friendly <k>Tyranid Warriors</k> unit.
when.de: In der Fernkampfphase deines Gegners oder in der Nahkampfphase, wenn eine feindliche Einheit eine befreundete <k>Tyraniden­krieger</k>-Einheit als Ziel wählt
when.es: En la fase de disparo de tu oponente o en la fase de combate, cuando una unidad enemiga tome como blanco una unidad <k>Guerreros Tiránidos</k> amiga.
when.fr: À la phase de Tir adverse ou à la phase de Combat, quand une unité ennemie cible une unité de <k>Guerriers Tyranides</k> amie.
when.it: Nella fase di Tiro dell’avversario o nella fase di Combattimento, quando un’unità nemica ha come bersaglio un’unità di <k>Tiranidi Guerrieri</k> amica.
when.ja: 敵軍側射撃フェイズ中、敵ユニットが味方<k>ティラニッド・ウォリアー</k>・ユニットを攻撃対象にした時。
when.ko: 상대의 사격 페이즈 또는 백병전 페이즈, 적 유닛이 아군 <k>티라니드 워리어</k> 유닛을 대상으로 지정했을 때.
when.zh: 在您对手的射击阶段中或在近战阶段中，当一个敌方单位对一个己方<k>泰伦武士</k>单位进行攻击时。

effect.en: Attacks that target your unit with a S greater than your unit’s T have -1 to wound rolls.
effect.de: Attacken gegen deine Einheit mit einer S, die höher ist als der W deiner Einheit, haben -1 auf Verwundungswürfe.
effect.es: Los ataques que tomen como blanco tu unidad con una F mayor que la R de tu unidad tienen -1 a las tiradas para herir.
effect.fr: Les attaques qui ciblent votre unité avec une F supérieure à son E ont -1 aux jets de blessure.
effect.it: Gli attacchi che hanno come bersaglio la tua unità con una Fo maggiore della R della tua unità hanno -1 ai tiri per ferire.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットを対象とした攻撃の【攻】が、その自軍ユニットの【耐】を上回っている場合、その攻撃のウーンズロールは-1の修正を受ける。
effect.ko: 이 유닛을 대상으로 지정하는 공격의 위력이 이 유닛의 내구보다 높다면, 그 공격에 타격 굴림 -1을 적용합니다.
effect.zh: 在针对您的单位进行的攻击的 S 大于该单位的 T 时，攻击的致伤掷骰 -1。

fluff.en: The sheer resilience of these warrior organisms appears nigh-supernatural to their horrified prey.
fluff.de: Die schiere Widerstandskraft dieser Kriegerorganismen erscheint ihrer erschrockenen Beute nahezu übernatürlich.
fluff.es: La imponente resistencia de estos guerreros resulta casi sobrenatural para sus aterrorizadas presas.
fluff.fr: La résistance de ces organismes guerriers semble surnaturelle pour sa proie horrifiée.
fluff.it: La resistenza di questi organismi guerrieri sembra incredibile agli occhi della preda terrorizzata.
fluff.ja: この戦闘個体が示す圧倒的な強靭さは、戦慄する獲物には神秘であるとすら感じられる。
fluff.ko: 공포에 질린 사냥감들의 눈에, 이 워리어 개체의 내구력과 회복력은 거의 초자연적인 수준이다.
fluff.zh: 对于惊恐万分的猎物而言，这些战斗生物体的坚韧体格是超乎寻常的。

target.en: That <k>Tyranid Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: その<k>ティラニッド・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット。

when.en: Your Shooting phase, when a friendly Tyranid Warriors unit is selected to shoot.
when.de: Deine Fernkampfphase, wenn eine befreundete Tyraniden­krieger-Einheit zum Schießen gewählt wird
when.es: En tu fase de disparo, cuando una unidad Guerreros Tiránidos amiga se elige para disparar.
when.fr: À votre phase de Tir, quand une unité de Guerriers Tyranides amie est choisie pour tirer.
when.it: Nella tua fase di Tiro, quando un’unità di Tiranidi Guerrieri amica viene scelta per tirare.
when.ja: 自軍側射撃フェイズ中、味方ティラニッド・ウォリアー・ユニットが射撃を宣言した時。
when.ko: 플레이어의 사격 페이즈, 아군 티라니드 워리어 유닛이 사격 수행을 위해 지정됐을 때.
when.zh: 在您的射击阶段中，当一个己方泰伦武士单位被选择进行射击时。

effect.en: Your unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Ignore Cover]</k>.
effect.es: Los ataques a distancia de tu unidad tienen <k>[Ignora cobertura]</k>.
effect.fr: Les attaques de tir de votre unité ont <k>[Ignore le Couvert]</k>.
effect.it: Gli attacchi da tiro della tua unità hanno <k>[Ignora la Copertura]</k>.
effect.ja: その自軍ユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［遮蔽無効］</k>を持つ。
effect.ko: 이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[엄폐 무시]</k>를 부여합니다.
effect.zh: 您的单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[无视掩体]</k>。

fluff.en: The projectiles fired by this weapon are infected with parasites that burrow into the central nervous systems of their targets, causing them to shriek and convulse, giving away their position to the oncoming swarms.
fluff.de: Die Projektile dieser Waffe sind mit Parasiten versetzt, die sich in das zentrale Nervensystem des Ziels graben, sodass es vor Schmerz jammert und von Krämpfen geschüttelt wird, wodurch es seine Position den nahenden Schwärmen verrät.
fluff.es: Los proyectiles disparados por esta arma están infectados con parásitos que penetran en el sistema nervioso central de sus objetivos, provocando lamentos y gritos de dolor que delatan su posición a los enjambres cercanos.
fluff.fr: Les projectiles tirés par cette arme sont infestés par des parasites qui s’enfouissent dans le système nerveux de leurs cibles  ; celles-ci poussent alors des hurlements de douleur et signalent ainsi leurs positions aux essaims en approche.
fluff.it: I proiettili esplosi da quest’arma sono infetti di parassiti che raggiungono il sistema nervoso centrale delle vittime provocando spasmi e urla di dolore, così da segnalarne la posizione agli sciami in arrivo.
fluff.ja: この兵器共生体が放つ弾丸は、標的に命中すると、体内を食い破って中枢神経系に到達し、悲鳴と痙攣を引き起こす。その結果、標的は自らの位置を露わにし、迫り来る群集団に察知されることとなる。
fluff.ko: 이 무기의 발사체는 중추 신경계를 파고드는 기생체에 감염되어 있다. 여기에 당한 목표물은 비명을 지르고 경련을 일으키면서 티라니드 무리에 위치를 드러내고 만다.
fluff.zh: 这件武器所发射出的寄生弹药能够钻入目标的神经中枢，使他们抽搐哀嚎，将自身的位置暴露出来。

name.ja: 小規模シナプス結節点

target.en: One friendly <k>Tyranid Warriors</k> unit.
target.ja: 味方<k>ティラニッド・ウォリアー</k>・ユニット1個。
target.zh: 一个己方<k>泰伦武士</k>单位。

when.en: End of your Movement phase.
when.es: Al final de tu fase de movimiento.
when.fr: À la fin de votre phase de Mouvement.
when.it: Alla fine della tua fase di Movimento.
when.ja: 自軍側移動フェイズ終了時。
when.zh: 在您的移动阶段结束时。

effect.en: Select one objective your unit is controlling. That objective is secured.
effect.de: Wähle ein von deiner Einheit kontrolliertes Missionsziel. Jenes Missionsziel ist gesichert.
effect.es: Elige 1 objetivo que tu unidad controle. Ese objetivo está asegurado.
effect.fr: Choisissez un objectif que votre unité contrôle. Cet objectif est sécurisé.
effect.it: Scegli un obiettivo controllato dalla tua unità. Quell’obiettivo è messo in sicurezza.
effect.ja: 自軍ユニットが確保している作戦目標1個を選択する。その作戦目標は安定化する。
effect.ko: 이 유닛이 장악한 목표물을 하나 지정합니다. 그 목표물은 확보 상태가 됩니다.
effect.zh: 选择一个您的单位控制的目标。那个目标被占领。

fluff.en: Shed like spores from chitinous exoskeletons, these micronodes infest the very battlefield with minute motes of the Hive Mind’s consciousness.
fluff.de: Wie Sporen werden diese mikroskopischen Lebensformen von Exoskeletten aus Chitin abgestoßen und befallen das Schlachtfeld selbst mit winzigen Bruchstücken des Schwarmbewusstseins.
fluff.es: Desprendidos como esporas de exoesqueletos quitinosos, estos micronodos infestan el campo de batalla con diminutas motas de la consciencia de la Mente Colmena.
fluff.fr: Telles des spores dispersées par des exosquelettes chitineux, ces micronodules infestent le champ de bataille de particules conscientes de l’Esprit-ruche.
fluff.it: Sparsi come spore dagli esoscheletri chitinosi, questi micronoduli infestano il campo di battaglia con corpuscoli che estendono la consapevolezza della Mente dell’Alveare.
fluff.ja: キチン質の外骨格から胞子状で放出される小規模結節点は、群巣意識体の意識の微粒子を戦場一帯に蔓延させる。
fluff.ko: 키틴질 외골격으로부터 먼지처럼 흩뿌려지는 이 극소 결절은 전장 자체를 군체 의식의 지각력으로 감염시킨다.
fluff.zh: 这些微型突触节点如同孢子一样从外骨骼上脱落，能够将战场覆盖在虫群意志的小型节点之下。

name.ja: 潜伏する狩猟体（アップグレード）

description.en: Von Ryan’s Leapers unit only. This unit has ‑3" detection range.
description.de: Nur für eine Von-Ryan-Springteufel-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat ‑3" Entdeckungsreichweite.
description.es: Solo unidades Saltadores de Von Ryan. Esta unidad tiene ‑3" al alcance de detección.
description.fr: Unité de Bondisseurs de Von Ryan seulement. Cette unité a ‑3" en portée de détection.
description.it: Solo unità di Saltatori di Von Ryan. Questa unità ha ‑3" alla distanza di individuazione.
description.ja: フォン・ライアンズ・リーパー・ユニットのみ。このユニットは発見範囲に-3mvの修正を受ける。
description.ko: 폰 라이언의 도약수 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 발각 범위 -3"를 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限冯·瑞恩跃袭者单位。该单位的侦测范围 ‑3"。

name.ja: 包囲する恐怖（アップグレード）

description.en: NEUROLICTOR/LICTOR/VON RYAN’S LEAPERS unit only. In your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit ends a move within 8" of this unit, this unit can make a normal move of up to D3+3".
description.de: Nur für eine Neuroliktor-/Liktor-/Von-Ryan-Springteufel-Einheit. Wenn eine feindliche Einheit in der Bewegungsphase deines Gegners eine Bewegung innerhalb von 8" um diese Einheit beendet, kann diese Einheit eine normale Bewegung von bis zu W3+3" ausführen.
description.es: Solo unidad LÍCTOR/NEUROLÍCTOR/SALTADORES DE VON RYAN. En la fase de movimiento del oponente, cuando una unidad enemiga termine un movimiento a 8" o menos de esta unidad, esta unidad puede hacer un movimiento normal de hasta 1D3+3".
description.fr: Unité de Lictor/Neurolictor/Bondisseurs de Von Ryan seulement. À la phase de Mouvement adverse, quand une unité ennemie finit un mouvement à 8" ou moins de cette unité, cette dernière peut faire un mouvement normal de D3+3" maximum.
description.it: Solo unità di Neurolittore/Littore/Saltatori di Von Ryan. Nella fase di Movimento dell’avversario, quando un’unità nemica termina un movimento entro 8" da questa unità, questa unità può effettuare un movimento normale di massimo D3+3".
description.ja: ニューロリクター/リクター/フォン・ライアンズ・リーパー・ユニットのみ。敵軍側移動フェイズ中、敵ユニットが、このユニットの8mv以内に一部でも入っている位置で移動を終了した時、このユニットは最大D3+3mvまで通常移動を行える。
description.ko: 뉴로릭터/릭터/폰 라이언의 도약수 유닛 전용. 상대의 이동 페이즈에, 적 유닛이 이 유닛의 8" 내에서 이동을 종료할 때, 이 유닛은 최대 D3+3"의 일반 이동을 수행할 수 있습니다.
description.zh: 仅限神经刀斧虫/刀斧虫/冯·瑞恩掠袭者单位。在对手的移动阶段中，当一个敌方单位在该单位 8" 内结束移动时，该单位可以进行一次最多D3+3" 的常规移动。

name.ja: 致命的照準（アップグレード）

description.en: <k>Norn Emissary</k> unit only. This unit’s ranged attacks have <k>[Anti‑Character 2+]</k>.
description.de: Nur für eine <k>Schwarmbote</k>-Einheit. Fernkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben <k>[Anti‑Charaktermodell 2+]</k>.
description.es: Solo unidad <k>Emisario Norn</k>. Los ataques a distancia de esta unidad tienen <k>[Antipersonaje 2+]</k>.
description.fr: Unité d’<k>Émissaire Norne</k> seulement. Les attaques de tir de cette unité ont <k>[Anti‑Personnage 2+]</k>.
description.it: Solo unità di <k>Emissario della Norna</k>. Gli attacchi da tiro di questa unità hanno <k>[Anti-Personaggio 2+]</k>.
description.ja: <k>ノルン・エミッサリー</k>・ユニットのみ。このユニットの射撃攻撃は<k>［キャラクター特効2+］</k>を持つ。
description.ko:
<k>노른의 사자</k> 유닛 전용.
이 유닛의 원거리 공격에 <k>[캐릭터 특화 2+]</k>를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限<k>诺恩使者</k>单位。该单位的远程攻击拥有<k>[针对角色 2+]</k>。

description.en: Winged Tyranid Prime/Tyranid Prime with lash whip model only. This unit’s melee attacks have +1 to hit rolls.
description.de: Nur für ein Geflügelter-Alphakrieger-/Alphakrieger-mit-Tentakelpeitsche-Modell. Die Nahkampfattacken dieser Einheit haben +1 auf Trefferwürfe.
description.es: Solo miniatura Tiránido Primus/Tiránido Primus con látigo orgánico. Los ataques de combate de esta unidad tienen +1 a las tiradas para impactar.
description.fr: Figurine de Primat Tyranide Ailé/Primat Tyranide avec bio-knout seulement. Les attaques de mêlée de cette unité ont +1 aux jets de touche.
description.it: Solo modelli di Tiranide Primus con Ali/Tiranide Primus con frusta sferzante. Gli attacchi da mischia di questa unità hanno +1 ai tiri per colpire.
description.ja: ティラニッド・プライム有翼種/ティラニッド・プライム（ラッシュウィップ装備）・兵のみ。このユニットの白兵攻撃はヒットロールに+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko: 비행형 티라니드 프라임/티라니드 프라임·거센 채찍 모델 전용. 이 유닛의 백병전 공격에 명중 굴림 +1을 적용합니다.
description.zh: 仅限有翼泰伦王虫/装备抽击鞭的泰伦王虫模型。该单位的近战攻击的命中掷骰 +1。

description.en: Norn Assimilator unit only. This unit has 4+ InSv.
description.de: Nur für eine Schwarmassimilator-Einheit. Diese Einheit hat 4+ RE.
description.es: Solo unidad Asimilador Norn. Esta unidad tiene una S Inv de 4+.
description.fr: Unité d’Assimilatrice Norne seulement. Cette unité a une SvIn de 4+.
description.it: Solo unità di Assimilatore della Norna. Questa unità ha SI 4+.
description.ja: ノルン・アシミレイター・ユニットのみ。このユニットは【特防】4+を持つ。
description.ko: 노른의 흡수자 유닛 전용. 이 유닛에 4+ 절대 방호를 부여합니다.
description.zh: 仅限诺恩同化者单位。该单位拥有 4+ InSv。

description.en:
Winged Tyranid Prime/Tyranid Prime with lash whip model only. This model’s melee attacks:
  • Can re-roll wound rolls.
  • Have +1 AP.
description.de:
Nur für ein Geflügelter-Alphakrieger-/Alphakrieger-mit-Tentakelpeitsche-Modell. Für Nahkampfwaffen dieses Modells:
  • können Verwundungswürfe wiederholt werden.
    • Nahkampfattacken dieses Modells haben +1 DS.
description.es:
Solo miniatura Tiránido Primus Alado/Tiránido Primus con látigo orgánico. Los ataques de combate de esta miniatura:
  • Pueden repetir las tiradas para herir.
  • Tiene +1 a FP.
description.fr:
Figurine de Primat Tyranide Ailé/Primat Tyranide avec bio-knout seulement. Les attaques de mêlée de cette figurine :
  • Peuvent relancer les jets de blessure.
  • Ont +1 en PA.
description.it:
Solo modelli di Tiranide Primus Alato/Tiranide Primus con frusta sferzante. Gli attacchi da mischia di questo modello:
  • Possono ripetere i tiri per ferire.
  • Hanno +1 VP.
description.ja:
ティラニッド・プライム有翼種/ティラニッド・プライム（ラッシュウィップ装備）・兵のみ。この兵の白兵攻撃は：
  • ウーンズロールをリロールできる。
  • 【貫】に+1の修正を受ける。
description.ko:
비행형 티라니드 프라임/티라니드 프라임·거센 채찍 모델 전용. 이 모델의 백병전 공격에 다음을 적용합니다.
  • 타격 굴림을 재굴림할 수 있음
